label: Pxyl/tet
note: Pxyl/tet: the TetR-repressible / anhydrotetracycline (aTc)-inducible promoter of the Staphylococcus aureus pRAB expression vectors (Helle et al. 2011). A consensus sigma-70/sigma-A -35 (TTGACA) / -10 (TATAAT) promoter carrying two Tn10 tet operators (the O2/O1 tandem) - one in the -35/-10 spacer and one downstream of the -10 - so bound TetR occludes RNA polymerase until aTc relieves repression. Sequence of record: pRAB11 (GenBank JN635500.1).
Canonical sigma-70/sigma-A -35 hexamer (TTGACA, perfect consensus) at the 5' edge of the part, separated from the -10 by a 17-bp spacer.

label: tetO1
note: Upstream (promoter-proximal) Tn10 tet operator: 19-bp dyad (CACTCTATCATTGATAGAG) dropped into the -35/-10 spacer so bound TetR homodimer occludes RNA polymer...
Consensus sigma-70/sigma-A -10 hexamer TATAAT (perfect match), 17 bp downstream of the -35, with tetO1 ending at its 5' edge and the +1 ~7 nt downstream.
Inferred transcription start site, placed ~7 nt 3' of the -10 per standard sigma-70/sigma-A geometry (6-8 nt spacing), between the -10 box and tetO2.

label: tetO2
note: Downstream (second) Tn10 tet operator at the 3' end: 19-bp dyad (TCTCTATCATTGATAGAGT) with the same core CTCTATCATTGATAGAG as tetO1.
